summary: Stateless async map agent that loads a single source file and skeleton context, calls Claude, and parses JSON response against FileFindingsReport.

findings.description: The map agent assumes that the LLM model will return a valid JSON object containing the finding descriptions. However, the model may return an invalid JSON response, which is not handled by the map agent.
findings.evidence:
```
[RETRY 1] Your response was invalid: Expecting ',' delimiter: line 24 column 46 (char 1039). Output ONLY a JSON object matching the schema. No markdown, no prose.
```

findings.description: The map agent assumes that the LLM model will return a valid JSON object containing the finding descriptions. However, if the model returns an empty JSON response, the map agent will not handle this scenario properly.
findings.evidence:
```
[RETRY 1] Your response was invalid: Expecting ',' delimiter: line 24 column 46 (char 1039). Output ONLY a JSON object matching the schema. No markdown, no prose.
```

interfaces_exported: run_map_agent(task: MapTask, client: LLMClient, config: Config, skeleton_text: str) -> FileFindingsReport | None
explicit_requirements: the LLM model must return a valid JSON object containing the finding descriptions

implicit_assumptions.assumption: the LLM model will return a valid JSON object containing the finding descriptions
implicit_assumptions.risk: the map agent will not handle invalid JSON responses properly

cross_file_flags: The map agent assumes that the LLM model will return a valid JSON object containing the finding descriptions. Verify that the LLM model will handle invalid JSON responses properly.
